emails.subject: Undue Influence
emails.body: Undue Influence I could not believe my ears when I heard from Ms. Heard that you are working covertly behind the scenes to ensure a Broadband win to the signed master competition. I would think that Credit would have no biased interest in the outcome of this race. Could such slanderous allegations be true?

emails.subject: Undue Influence
emails.body: Undue Influence I could not believe my ears when I heard from Ms. Heard that you are working covertly behind the scenes to ensure a Broadband win to the signed master competition. I would think that Credit would have no biased interest in the outcome of this race. Could such slanderous allegations be true?

emails.subject: Re: Undue Influence
emails.body: Re: Undue Influence My compensation is directly affected by the success of EBS go figure! To be fair, I am also facilitating a significant number of ISDAs which of course are my first love. If you are looking for unbiased, Bill may be your best bet as he is probably indifferent between ENA, EPMI, EBS, EES, etc as his compensation is affected by all of them!! From: Tana Jones on 09/12/2000 06:00 PM
